text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a few days after the Arima Kinen, and Vodka
is furious.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That Scarlet! I told her not to push herself, but
she went and trained so hard she collapsed!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm... Maybe. Ugh, fine! I'll try and figure out what it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So, what is it? Why did you drag me out here?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I heard this place is really relaxing. I don't know
what's on your mind, but I'm treating you today,
so hurry up and feel better!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, excuuuuse you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Things don't go according to Vodka's plans...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Look, Scarlet! They're doing a dolphin show over
there!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Don't care. Go see it yourself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It says we can touch starfish over at that pool.
Wanna check it out?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No thanks.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's with the attitude today?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who brought me here against my
will.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is the thanks I get after going out of my way
to—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're the one person I don't want fussing over
me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you?! What do you mean by that?! Hey,
the light's red!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BEEP BEEEEP!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What are you doing, stupid?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Rrrgh... Argh! This is the worst! I'm the worst!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I was already miserable enough over how I
panicked and overworked myself, and now you're
pitying me too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
None of this is even your fault, but here I am,
getting annoyed and taking my anger out on you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have dragged you out
here without even asking what was bothering
you...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's fine... I'll tell you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I never managed to win a single G1 race
against you! Not even one!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait... You're getting upset about that now?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Shut it! I know it's all in the past, but I just can't
help feeling frustrated about it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The more I think about it, the more I feel like I
could've done better! That's why I—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sob! Ugh, I hate this! I feel so pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Look. I might have won a lot of G1 races, sure.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that was only because you were there with
me. You motivated me to run like hell, because I
didn't want to lose to you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you weren't running alongside me, there's no
way I could've won that many races. At least,
that's what I think.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Where'd all that come from?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Sorry for sulking about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After apologizing, Daiwa Scarlet walks away...
And as she goes, her steps seem a great deal
lighter than before.
